name: Wacky Cupcakes- Diabetic
recipeInstructions:
1. PLACE FLOUR, SUGAR, COCOA POWDER AND SALT IN A MIXER BOWL AND BEAT AT LOW SPEED TO BLEND.
2. BEAT TOGETHER REMAINING INGREDIENTS WITH A FORK UNTIL WELL COMBINED.
3. ADD ALL AT ONCE TO DRY INGREDIENTS AND BEAT AT MEDIUM SPEED UNTIL SMOOTH.
4. PAPER-LINE 12 MUFFIN TINS OR GREASE EACH TIN WITH VEGETABLE OIL AND COAT WITH FLOUR.
5. FILL TINS ABOUT 1/2 FULL WITH THE BATTER.
6. PREHEAT OVENS TO 350°F (175°C).
7. BAKE FOR ABOUT 30 MINUTES, OR UNTIL A CAKE TESTER COMES OUT CLEAN WHEN INSERTED INTO THE CENTER OF THE CUPCAKES.
Note: This recipe is adapted from "The New Diabetic Cookbook" by Mabel Cavaiani and shared by Bridget Benjamin (PHFC09A) on Prodigy's Healthy Eating - Food and Wine Bulletin Board.
